first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively identical. Both evaluations focus on the same core issue: a mismatch between the candidate's experience (D, TypeScript, C++) and the role's requirements (Java, Kotlin, Spring, JVM). The minor variations in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's work locations being changed from various global cities to Brazil.
